title: On the Bowery
writer: Richard Bagley, Lionel Rogosin, Mark Sufrin
actors: Ray Salyer, Gorman Hendricks, Frank Matthews
plot: By focusing on the lives of three down-and-out alcoholic transients, the film creates a wrenching portrait of the tragic hopelessness of life on "The Bowery" in New York City.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 1 nomination total
